ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the trade date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the trade date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the trade date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the trade date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for corporate actions */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on the trade date */,
  "pre_market_open_price" REAL /* Opening price before the market opens */,
  "pre_market_high_price" REAL /* Highest price before the market opens */,
  "pre_market_low_price" REAL /* Lowest price before the market opens */,
  "pre_market_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded before the market opens */,
  "after_hours_close_price" REAL /* Closing price after the market closes */,
  "after_hours_high_price" REAL /* Highest price after the market closes */,
  "after_hours_low_price" REAL /* Lowest price after the market closes */,
  "after_hours_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded after the market closes */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol of the instrument (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument (e.g., Apple Inc.) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the instrument (e.g., Equity, Option) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is listed (e.g., NASDAQ) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the instrument is listed */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency code (e.g., USD) */,
  "target_currency" TEXT /* Target currency code (e.g., EUR) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate from base to target currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was last modified */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing performance metrics of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset in the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that this asset belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the instrument held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the instrument */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was purchased */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset's details were last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., economics, technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the performance metrics */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return over the specified date range */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measure over the specified date range */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "risk_factor" TEXT /* Risk factor being assessed (e.g., market risk, credit risk) */,
  "risk_value" REAL /* Value of the risk factor */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the risk assessment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the risk assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
